criteria.key: Talent Acquisition Manager|Recruitment Manager|Head of Talent|Talent Acquisition Lead
HR Manager|HR Business Partner|Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist|Senior Recruiter
Full-Cycle Recruiting (Sourcing, Screening, Interviewing, Offer Negotiation)
Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and Sourcing Tools

Own and execute the talent acquisition strategy to meet business goals.|Build and manage the end-to-end recruitment process, partnering with hiring managers on workforce planning.|Lead, mentor, and develop the team of recruiters.|Implement data-driven methods to measure and improve recruitment effectiveness.|Develop and execute employer branding and talent marketing initiatives.|Ensure a healthy pipeline of qualified candidates for key roles through proactive sourcing and networking.|Ensure all hiring activities are compliant with U.S. labor laws and internal policies.
5 years of progressive experiencein talent acquisition
Experience in the U.S. Construction or Real Estate Development sector

Product Manager|Card Product Manager|Product Manager, Cards|Product Owner, Cards|Senior Product Manager
Technical Product Manager|Digital Product Manager|Product Manager, Fintech

Own the end-to-end product lifecycle for new card products, from concept and build to launch and scaling.|Develop and own the product strategy and roadmap for the company's card offerings.|Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Engineering, Design, Marketing, Legal) to ensure successful product launches.|Conduct continuous market and competitor analysis to identify new opportunities and ensure product-market fit.|Define, monitor, and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive product growth and success.|Manage key technical and operational aspects of card products, including BIN management and payment network relationships.

Client Accountant|Senior Accountant|Audit Senior|Business Services Accountant|Financial Accountant

Manage the end-to-end accounting cycle for a portfolio of clients in compliance with IFRS.|Oversee all month-end and year-end closing activities, including bank reconciliations, payroll, and fixed asset schedules.|Assess internal controls and financial risks for clients, recommending and implementing improvements.|Ensure timely and accurate preparation and filing of VAT returns and corporate tax for clients.|Serve as the primary liaison for external auditors during client audits.|Deliver expert accounting and financial reporting support to a dedicated client base. Deliver expert accounting and financial reporting support to a dedicated client base.
at least 2 years in an accounting/audit firm
